text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down sharply over 24 hours, with Ethereum's 4.2% decline outpacing Bitcoin's 3.1% drop, suggesting broader risk-off sentiment beyond just macro headwinds. The Fear & Greed index at 23 reflects extreme fear with no improvement over the week, while Bitcoin dominance holding firm at 56.2% indicates investors are rotating into the perceived safer major rather than fleeing crypto entirely. Volume at $75B is moderate, consistent with defensive positioning rather than capitulation selling.
